compositionPolicy.native: All value, form, autocomplete, inputmode, validation, paste, and autofill behavior stays native.
compositionPolicy.field: ID, description, error, required, and invalid state are inherited from Field unless explicitly supplied.
compositionPolicy.enhancement: clearable adds a labelled, focus-retaining native value-clear action that participates in controlled or uncontrolled change handling and form reset; false emits no button or handler.
